w:r.w:t: Complete Phase-by-Phase Build Guide for Antigravity
Stack: Antigravity · Supabase · Vercel · GoDaddy · Stitch · Razorpay
Yeh document tera complete step-by-step guide hai. Har phase ke andar:
Phase ka poora context diya hai — kya banana hai aur kyu
Supabase SQL, settings, aur configuration details hain
Antigravity ko dene wala exact prompt box hai (gold border mein)
Prompt seedha copy karke Antigravity mein paste karo — woh page/component build karega
Important: Phases ek ke baad ek karo — ek phase complete hone ke baad agla shuru karo.
Saare tools, accounts aur credentials configure karo — Day 1
supabase.com pe jao → New Project banao
Region: ap-south-1 (Mumbai — India ke liye fast)
Project URL aur anon key copy karo → ek file mein save karo
vercel.com pe signup karo (GitHub se login karo)
Abhi kuch deploy nahi karna — bas account ready rakho
godaddy.com pe apna domain khareedo (e.g. watchkart.in ya luxewatches.in)
Domain mil jaane ke baad DNS settings mein jaana hoga (Phase 8 mein)
Test Mode mein Key ID aur Key Secret copy karo
Live keys baad mein activate honge jab website ready ho
API Key copy karo — order confirmation emails ke liye use hoga
Is phase mein koi page build nahi hoga.
Bas yeh credentials ek notes file mein save karo:
In sabko Antigravity ke Environment Variables section mein add karo.
Settings → Environment → Add Variable karo har ek ke liye.
Supabase dashboard mein SQL Editor kholo aur yeh saara SQL run karo. Yeh ek hi baar karna hai.
-- USERS table (Supabase Auth ke saath sync hogi)
id uuid references auth.users on delete cascade primary key,
id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
order_id uuid references orders(id) on delete cascade,
id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
city text, state text, pincode text,
id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
Supabase → Storage → New Bucket → Name: product-images
Public bucket rakho (images publicly accessible honi chahiye)
Har table pe RLS enable karo: Table → RLS → Enable
profiles: users apna data dekh sakein, admin sab dekhe
orders: users sirf apne orders dekhen
products: sab read kar sakein, sirf admin write kare
Is phase mein Antigravity ko sirf yeh batana hai:
Inhe project ke environment variables mein connect karo.
Database schema mein yeh tables hain:
Ab main website ka design shuru karna chahta hoon."
Yeh phase mein poori website ka visual identity setup hoga. Ek baar yeh set ho gaya to baaki pages automatically isi theme follow karengi.
Mujhe ek premium luxury watch eCommerce website banani hai.
Brand name: [WATCH BRAND NAME] (seller se puchh ke fill karo)
Dark green + warm gold — nature luxury05
- Left: Logo (watch icon + brand name in Playfair Display, gold color)
- Center: Nav links (Home, Shop, About, Contact)
- Right: Search icon, Wishlist heart icon (with count badge), Cart icon (with count badge), User avatar/login button
- On scroll: navbar becomes slightly more opaque with blur backdrop
- Mobile: hamburger menu with slide-out drawer
- 4 columns: Brand info + tagline | Shop Links | Account Links | Contact + WhatsApp button
- Bottom bar: Copyright + payment icons (Razorpay, UPI, Cards)
- Product image (fills top 65% of card) with zoom effect on hover
- Price (gold color, bold) + original price (strikethrough if discounted)
- Heart icon (wishlist toggle) — top right corner of image
- "Add to Cart" button appears on hover (slides up from bottom)
- Out of stock overlay if stock = 0
- Primary: Gold background (#C9A84C), black text, no border-radius (sharp edges)
- Secondary: Transparent, gold border, gold text
5. LOADING SKELETON: Dark grey shimmer animation for product cards while loading
6. TOAST NOTIFICATION: Bottom-right corner, dark background, gold left border
Yeh design system globally apply karo taaki baaki pages isi theme follow karein.
Home page visitors ka pehla impression hai. Ispe Supabase se live data aayega — featured products, active banners, categories.
HOME PAGE banao with these sections:
Background: Dark with subtle gold particle/grain texture overlay.
- Small tag above heading: "LUXURY TIMEPIECES" (gold, letter-spaced, small caps)
- Main heading: "Time Is Your Most Precious Asset" (Playfair Display, very large, white)
- Subheading: "Curated collection of premium watches" (DM Sans, muted)
- Two CTA buttons side by side:
- Scroll indicator arrow at bottom center (animated bounce)
Fetch from Supabase table 'banners' where is_active=true, use first banner's image_url as background if available.
4 category cards in a row (2x2 on mobile):
- Background image (use placeholder gradient if no image)
- On hover: slight scale + gold border
Fetch from Supabase: SELECT * FROM products WHERE is_featured=true AND is_active=true LIMIT 8
Display using Product Card component from design system.
If no products yet: show 4 skeleton loaders.
Full-width dark section with gold accents.
Text: "Limited Time Offer — Up to 30% Off"
Countdown timer (set to 24 hours from page load — updates every second)
Each has icon (gold), heading, short description.
Fetch from Supabase: SELECT reviews.*, profiles.name FROM reviews JOIN profiles LIMIT 4
Display as cards: Star rating (gold stars), comment text, customer name.
If no reviews yet: show 3 placeholder cards.
- Hero text: staggered fade-up on load
- Sections: fade-in as user scrolls down (intersection observer)
- Product cards: staggered appear (100ms delay between each)
Browse, filter, search, detail view — Day 5-6
- Category checkboxes: Luxury, Sport, Casual, Smart Watch
- Brand checkboxes (fetch distinct brands from products table)
- On mobile: filters hide in a drawer opened by "Filters" button
- Right: Sort dropdown (Newest, Price Low-High, Price High-Low, Popular)
- View toggle: Grid view | List view icons
- Default: 3 columns (2 on tablet, 1 on mobile)
- Fetch from Supabase with filters applied in real-time
- Each product uses Product Card component
- Pagination: 12 products per page, numbered pagination at bottom
- Filter products by name/brand containing search term
- If no products match: show a nice illustration + "No watches found" message + "Clear Filters" button
- Below: thumbnail gallery row (all product images)
- Rating stars + review count (clickable, scrolls to reviews)
- Discount price (gold, large, bold) + Original price (strikethrough, muted)
- Discount percentage badge (e.g. "15% OFF") if discounted
- Stock status: "In Stock (X left)" in green or "Out of Stock" in red
- Quantity selector: minus button, number, plus button
- ADD TO CART button (full width, gold, large)
- ADD TO WISHLIST button (outline, with heart icon)
- WhatsApp Order button: "Order via WhatsApp" (green, sends pre-filled message)
Tab 2: Reviews — fetch from reviews table where product_id matches
- Show rating breakdown (5 stars X%, 4 stars Y%, etc.)
- List of reviews (name, date, stars, comment)
- If user is logged in: show "Write a Review" form
Tab 3: Shipping Info — static text about delivery
Below tabs: "You May Also Like" heading
Fetch 4 products from same category, show Product Cards
AUTH PAGE banao (single page, tabs for Login/Register):
- Split screen layout: Left side has luxury watch image/dark gradient, Right side has form
- "Continue with Google" button (use Supabase Google OAuth)
- On successful login: redirect to /account or previous page
- Store session using Supabase Auth session
- Show error messages below inputs (wrong password, email exists, etc.)
Cart data: store in localStorage (JSON array of {product_id, quantity, product details})
- Remove button (X icon, shows on hover)
- Empty cart state: illustration + "Your cart is empty" + Shop Now button
- Coupon code input field + APPLY button
- On valid code: show discount amount
- PROCEED TO CHECKOUT button (gold, full width, large)
- If not logged in: redirect to /auth first
- Show saved addresses from Supabase addresses table
- Each address: radio button to select, shows name/address details
- Name, Phone, Address Line 1, Line 2, City, State, Pincode
- If Online: PLACE ORDER & PAY button
- Calls Supabase Edge Function to create Razorpay order
- Opens Razorpay checkout popup (use razorpay.js CDN)
- On payment success: create order in Supabase + clear cart + redirect to /order/success
- Create order in Supabase with payment_status='cod'
Supabase Edge Function needed for Razorpay (tell me when to create this).
Base Route: /account (all sub-routes protected — login required)
- User avatar (circle, initials fallback) + name + email
- Nav links: My Profile | My Orders | Wishlist | Addresses | Notifications | Logout
- Active state: gold left border + gold text
- Main content area (right): changes per route
- Mobile: sidebar collapses to bottom tab bar
- Save changes → update Supabase profiles table
- Fetch from Supabase: orders where user_id = logged-in user
- Status badge (color coded: pending=yellow, confirmed=blue, shipped=orange, delivered=green, cancelled=red)
- Status tracker (visual stepper): Placed → Confirmed → Shipped → Delivered
- Order items table (image, name, qty, price)
- Fetch from Supabase: wishlist where user_id = current user, join with products
- Product grid (same Product Card but with "Remove from Wishlist" option)
- "Move to Cart" button on each card
- Empty state: heart illustration + "No saved items"
- Default address highlighted with gold border
- Edit / Delete / Set as Default options on each
- Fetch from Supabase: notifications where user_id = current user
- Each notification: icon (based on type), message, time ago
- "Mark all read" button (updates is_read=true for all)
Complete dashboard, products, orders management — Day 8-12
Admin panel ek alag layout hoga — dark sidebar. Sirf 'admin' role wale users access kar saken. Route guard lagana zaroori hai.
If non-admin tries to access: redirect to /
- Each nav item: icon + label, gold on active
- Top bar: Page title + breadcrumbs + notification bell + admin user avatar
- Total Orders Today: count from orders where date = today
- Revenue This Month: sum of total_amount where payment_status='paid' and this month
- Total Products: count from products where is_active=true
- Pending Orders: count from orders where status='pending'
Each card: icon, value (large, bold), label, small trend indicator
- Left (60%): Bar chart — Orders last 30 days (use chart.js or recharts)
- Right (40%): Donut chart — Orders by status breakdown
Columns: Order ID, Customer, Amount, Status, Date
Each row: click to open order detail
Show product name, brand, current stock
- Top: "Products (X total)" heading + search input + "Add New Product" button (gold)
- Filter row: Category dropdown | Brand dropdown | Status toggle (active/inactive)
Columns: Image thumbnail | Name | Brand | Category | Price | Stock | Status toggle | Actions
- Status toggle: switch to activate/deactivate product in Supabase
- Actions: Edit icon | Delete icon (confirm modal)
- Drag & drop area OR click to select
- Show uploaded image previews (can delete individual)
- Bottom: Save Product button (gold) | Cancel button
- On save: INSERT or UPDATE in Supabase products table
- Top: search by order ID or customer name + status filter tabs (All | Pending | Confirmed | Shipped | Delivered | Cancelled)
Columns: Order ID | Customer | Items | Amount | Payment | Status | Date | Actions
- Order info: ID, date, customer name + phone + email (clickable WhatsApp link)
- Order Items table: image, product name, qty, unit price, subtotal
- Payment info: method, status, Razorpay ID if applicable
Current status badge + dropdown to change status
On status change: update Supabase + trigger notification to user
For 'shipped': input field for tracking number
- Table: Name | Email | Phone | Joined date | Total orders | Actions
- Click user: see their order history
- Table: Code | Discount% | Uses/Max | Expiry | Status | Actions
Code (auto-generate button), Discount %, Max Uses, Expiry date
- Show current banners with preview images
- Add banner: upload image, title, subtitle, link URL, active toggle
- Revenue chart: monthly for last 12 months (line chart)
- Revenue summary table: this week, this month, this year
- All data fetched from orders + order_items with joins
Store Name | WhatsApp Number | Email | UPI ID for display
- Save button → store in Supabase settings table
1. FLOATING CHAT BUTTON (already done in Phase 02 — verify it's working):
- Fixed bottom-right, green circle, WhatsApp icon
- Opens: https://wa.me/[SELLER_WHATSAPP_NUMBER]?text=Hi, I need help with my order
Jab bhi naya order place ho (in checkout flow):
- Ek WhatsApp link generate karo pre-filled with order details
- Ya Supabase Database Webhook set karo:
URL: ek simple endpoint jo WhatsApp Business API call kare
- Simple option: Twilio WhatsApp API se message bhejo admin ko
Admin panel → Order detail → Status update karne pe:
- Generate link: wa.me/[CUSTOMER_PHONE]?text=Your order [ID] has been [STATUS]
- Admin ek click se customer ko manually message bhej sake
Content: Logo, Thank you message, Order items table, Total, Delivery address,
Subject: "Your order is on the way!"
Content: Tracking number if available, estimated delivery, contact
Content: Welcome message, Shop now button, WhatsApp contact
- Bell icon in navbar shows unread count (red badge)
- Fetch from Supabase notifications table where user_id = current user
- Supabase Realtime subscribe karo — jab naya notification insert ho to badge update ho
- Click bell: dropdown shows last 5 notifications
a) Order status change: "Your order #ID has been shipped"
b) New arrival (admin can send): "New watches just added!"
c) Coupon available: "Use code SAVE20 for 20% off"
- Hero section: Brand name large, gold, with a watch-themed dark background
- "Our Story" section: 2 column — text left, image right
Text: Why we started, what makes us different (fill in seller's real story)
- Numbers section: years in business, watches sold, happy customers, brands
- Team/brand values section (dark cards, gold icons)
- WhatsApp: [NUMBER] with big green WA button
- Submit button (saves to a messages table in Supabase OR sends email via Resend)
- Fetch products from Supabase where name ILIKE '%query%' OR brand ILIKE '%query%'
- Same product grid as shop page
(Content seller will provide, just build the layout)
- Add meta title and description to each page
- Open Graph tags (for WhatsApp/social sharing preview)
- Sitemap generate karo (Antigravity may handle this)
Razorpay ka secret key kabhi frontend mein nahi dalna chahiye. Isliye Supabase Edge Functions use hongi.
Supabase Edge Function — Create Razorpay Order
Supabase CLI install karo: npm install -g supabase
Supabase dashboard mein secrets add karo: RAZORPAY_KEY_ID, RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET
Checkout page mein Razorpay integrate karo:
c. On payment failure: show error toast
Directly create order in Supabase with:
Saab kuch check karo deploy se pehle — Day 14-15
Register karo naye email se — confirmation email aaya?
Login karo — session persist kar rahi hai?
Product detail page — images, add to cart karo
Cart mein jao — quantity update karo, remove karo
Coupon code apply karo (pehle ek test coupon banao admin se)
Order success page aaya? Order Supabase mein create hua?
Account → My Orders mein order dikh raha hai?
Wishlist — product save karo, remove karo
Admin account se login karo → /admin access mila?
Non-admin user se /admin access karo — block hua?
Product add karo with images — product-images bucket mein gaya?
Order status update karo — customer ko notification aayi?
Coupon create karo — frontend se use karo
Dashboard stats sahi dikh rahe hain?
Navbar hamburger menu kaam kar raha hai?
Product grid 1 column ho raha hai mobile pe?
Cart aur checkout mobile pe usable hain?
Admin panel mobile pe accessible hai?
Page load time 3 seconds se kam hai?
Antigravity se project export karo (GitHub repo mein push karo)
vercel.com → New Project → Import GitHub repo
Framework: Next.js (ya jo Antigravity use kare)
Vercel → Project Settings → Domains → Add domain → yourdomain.in
Vercel will give you: A Record IP aur CNAME value
SSL automatic ho jaata hai Vercel se
Razorpay Test keys → Live keys change karo
Test orders aur dummy data delete karo
Seller ko pehla product add karne mein help karo
Live website URL with custom domain
Screen recording: admin pe product kaise add karein
Screen recording: order kaise process karein
Bugs fix karna (jo testing mein miss ho gaye)
Minor content changes (product add/edit seller seekh le to yeh nahi chahiye)
Built with: Antigravity · Supabase · Vercel · GoDaddy · Stitch · Claude AI
